title: aira tenorei proles intermedia
intro: Aira tenorei proles intermedia, also known as intermediate meadow-grass or aira intermedia, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of aira tenorei proles intermedia include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be used in the form of tincture or essential oil for its medicinal properties.
